title: Inline PR Comments
summary: The reviewer posts structured inline comments directly on changed lines, with severity levels and actionable suggestions.

title: CLI Setup Wizard
summary: Interactive wizard guides you through authentication, repo selection, and workflow generation in under a minute.

title: Desktop Chat App
summary: IX Chat lives in your system tray, providing instant access to AI conversations with tool calling support.

title: Email Tool Pack
summary: AI assistants can compose, search, and manage emails through the Email tool pack with Exchange and Graph API support.

title: Web Setup UI
summary: Local web interface for configuring reviewers, managing authentication, and monitoring usage across repositories.

title: Active Directory Tools
summary: Query and manage Active Directory users, groups, and computers through AI-powered natural language commands.
